main.description: Fulfillment policy: runs a GitHub Actions workflow via the policy-engine for maximum configurability. The workflow evaluates whether a bidder satisfies the requester's values and strategic principles. Supports arbitrary admission logic — DID allowlists, trust score thresholds, domain patterns, multi-party approval gates. Carries downstream through subcontracting chains.

requesterDid.description: ATProto DID of the root requester. Passed as input to the workflow evaluation.

workflowRef.description: Strong reference to a workflow definition record — the GHA workflow that evaluates bidder eligibility.

engineUrl.description: URL of the policy-engine that executes the workflow (e.g. the requester's spindle policy engine endpoint).

signatures.description: badge.blue attestations over this policy. Must include the requester's inline signature, attached at creation.
